title: specpilot config
description: Configuration for the specpilot cogloop plugin

owner.description: GitHub org or username that owns the project board

projectNumber.description: GitHub Project number (from the project URL)

assignee.description: Optional: only pick tickets assigned to this GitHub username

name.description: Repo name (used in PR titles and comments)

path.description: Relative path to the repo from the project root

type.description: frontend/backend repos get implemented; spec repo gets the speckit artifacts

testCommand.description: Command to run tests (e.g. 'npm test'). Required for frontend/backend.

buildCommand.description: Command to run build (e.g. 'npm run build'). Required for frontend/backend.

waitForCI.description: Whether to wait for CI checks to pass before merging the PR for this repo. Auto-detected during install based on presence of .github/workflows/. Defaults to false.

specsDir.description: Relative path to the spec repo (where speckit writes artifacts)

workspaceDir.description: Relative path to the workspace root (where speckit slash commands are available)

statuses.description: GitHub Project column names — must match exactly
